sections.paragraph:
Original: דּשׁן דּשׁון דּישׁן דּישׁון

Transliteration: dı̂yshôn dı̂yshôn dishôn dishôn

Phonetic: dee-shone'

BDB Definition:

Dishon = "thresher"
  1. the fifth son of Seir
  2. the son of Anah and grandson of Seir

Origin: the same as H1788

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
